payload.answer: SQL debug execution is disabled because BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false. The query was not executed.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an administrative SQL/debug command, not a durable user memory statement.

details: Rejected admin SQL request: debug SQL execution is disabled.
No memory cards were created or modified.

repair_options: Enable BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED in an appropriate debug environment before issuing admin SQL commands.
Use supported non-SQL admin/debug inspection commands if available.
